name: WASM Linux Executor
description: Executes shell commands in an ephemeral WASM Linux VM. Full Alpine Linux environment with network access. Output is collected and returned as artifacts.

tools.name: executor-wasm.execute
tools.description: Execute a shell command in a fresh WASM Linux VM. The VM has access to /repo (read-only) and /tmp (writable scratch). Network is available.

command.description: Shell command to execute in the VM.
